2237310.name: Transparent
2237310.description:
Transparent is a minimalist narrative game where every choice matters. You follow Clara, a young woman spending her 30th birthday alone in her apartment. As she reflects on her past, you’ll relive key moments of her life and make decisions that shape who she becomes.

Will Clara stay grounded in reality, or will she fade away, becoming more transparent with every choice? With its unique black-and-white art style and multiple endings, Transparent is a reflective journey about identity, connection, and the power of our decisions.
